title: Cycle Trading Signal 🔥 appsheet Predictions Before Market Open 🔥 In this volatile market how can it make so many right predictions and here is how ! Here all the predictions from this morning before market open 🔥
author: Patient-Knowledge915

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: Now! My question is, do you want to see the price predictions it did yesterday at 2 pm?

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: "The question isn't just where the market is now, but where it's shifting before the bell. My Cycle Trading Signal process is designed for exactly this kind of late-day volatility. Interesting moves ahead."

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: ​"Early data from my 10:00 AM analysis provided a clear lead on today’s market direction. The Cycle Trading Signal is currently validating the anticipated momentum as the session unfolds."

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: "Today’s market move was no surprise—the 10:00 AM data captured the shift perfectly. The Cycle Trading Signal is already processing the trajectory for tomorrow morning. If you aren't positioned for the next cycle before the 4:00 PM close, you're already behind."

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body:
"In a market defined by global volatility and the uncertainty of conflict, guessing isn't a strategy—it’s a liability.
​The analysis I ran before the opening bell today nailed today's move while the crowd was still caught in the noise. The Cycle Trading Signal doesn't just track price; it identifies the trajectory through the chaos.
​While most are waiting for the close to see what happens next, the data for tomorrow’s open is already locked in. If you aren't seeing the shift before 4:00 PM, you're already behind the curve."

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body:
"The results are in: Out of the core tech and index trackers analyzed in this morning's pre-market run, over 85% of the stocks on the list are currently trading well above the opening price. >
While the broader market was distracted by the 'chaos' of global volatility, the Cycle Trading Signal already had the trajectory locked in. We hit Target Level 1 on the majority of the board before lunch."

comments.author: SpiritHubris
comments.body: How do you get notified of your exits (either take profit / stop loss)? Is that part of that spreadsheet as well? (Can't make out any headers if they're in the screenshot).

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: The appsheet has a pullback signal that's your stop loss and has 5 targets to exit the trade. The post headers Ticker  Price   Targetprice T1 T2 T3 T4
